km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស, uណៃteត គីnហ្គដុម

zh.lifeSummary: Lovet de Louet Levett Leavitt是Lovet Levett的兒子，於1300年出生在英國英格蘭。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lovet de Louet Levett Leavitt是Lovet Levett的儿子，于1300年出生在英国英格兰。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Louet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of German   Lauer  . Compare   Lower   3.
Possibly also English: variant of   Lower   1.

variants.name: Lauer
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname from Middle High German lūre, German Lauer ‘crafty or cunning person, cheat’ (apparently originally ‘one with narrowed eyes’). This surname is also found in France (mainly Lorraine, also Alsace).
German: occupational name for a tanner, Middle High German lōwer, from lō ‘tannin’, which is extracted from the bark of trees.
South German: habitational name from Lauer in Franconia, named from the stream on which it stands.

nameMeanings.name: Levett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Leavitt  .

variants.name: Leavitt
meanings: English:
(of Norman origin): nickname from Anglo-Norman French leuet ‘wolf cub’ (see Low 3).
habitational name from any of various places in Normandy called Livet. All are of obscure, presumably Gaulish, etymology.

nameMeanings.name: Leavitt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English:
(of Norman origin): nickname from Anglo-Norman French leuet ‘wolf cub’ (see Low 3).
habitational name from any of various places in Normandy called Livet. All are of obscure, presumably Gaulish, etymology.

variants.name: Low
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived near a tumulus, mound or hill, Middle English lowe, from Old English hlāw (see Law 2).

Scottish and English: nickname for a short man, from Middle English lah, lowe (Old Norse lágr; the word was adopted first into the northern dialects of Middle English, where Scandinavian influence was strong, and then spread south, with regular alteration of the vowel quality).

English and Scottish (of Norman origin): nickname for a violent or dangerous person, from Anglo-Norman French lou, leu ‘wolf’ (from Latin lupus). Wolves were relatively common in Britain at the time when most surnames were formed, as there still existed large tracts of uncleared forest.

variants.name: Levitt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Isador, Isadore, Ari, Batya, Hersh, Mayer, Meyer, Rina.
English: variant of   Leavitt  .
Jewish(Ashkenazic): variant of   Levit  .

variants.name: Levett
meanings: English: variant of   Leavitt  .

nameMeanings.name: Lovet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English lovere ‘lover’, ‘sweetheart’.

en.lifeSummary: Lovet de Louet Levett Leavitt was born in 1300, in England, United Kingdom as the son of Lovet Levett. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lovet de Louet Levett Leavitt est né en 1300, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Lovet Levett. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Lovet de Louet Levett Leavitt wurde 1300 in England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Lovet Levett geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Lovet de Louet Levett Leavitt è nato il nel 1300 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Lovet Levett. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Lovet de Louet Levett Leavittは1300年にイギリスイギリスでLovet Levettの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Lovet de Louet Levett Leavitt(은)는 1300년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lovet Levett의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lovet de Louet Levett Leavitt nasceu em 1300, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Lovet Levett. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Lovet de Louet Levett Leavitt родился в 1300 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Lovet Levett. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Lovet de Louet Levett Leavitt nació en 1300, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Lovet Levett. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
